title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXII. Relics.
content:
Hink, minx! the old witch winks,
            The fat begins to fry:
        There's nobody at home but jumping Joan,
            Father, mother, and I.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Unknown delivers a powerful performance in "Nursery Rhyme. DCXII. Relics."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
